indicators.name: couch
indicators.rationale: The presence of a couch suggests a living area rather than a dedicated workspace.

indicators.name: large windows
indicators.rationale: Large windows can lead to distractions and reduced privacy.

indicators.name: lack of flat work surface
indicators.rationale: No flat surface at sitting height for a laptop or monitor.

indicators.name: low lighting
indicators.rationale: Ambient lighting may not be sufficient for screen work.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The presence of a couch and large windows suggests a living area rather than a dedicated workspace. There is no flat work surface at sitting height, and the lighting appears to be low, which may not be suitable for extended screen work. However, the presence of a flat-screen TV and a cabinet suggests some level of technology readiness.
